items.title: The Odyssey (Nolan) Rotten Tomatoes Tomatometer strictly above 90 on Mon Jul 20 (opening score)
items.rationale: Core: Nolan's The Odyssey (wide release Jul 17; resolves Mon Jul 20 10:00 ET on the OPENING Tomatometer). As of Jul 12, 0 reviews posted (critic embargo not lifted); social-reaction embargo lifted ~2wk early with uniformly glowing early takes ('one of Nolan's best', Best Picture frontrunner, Forbes Jul 7). Bull case (Opus family, q 0.70-0.82): opening Tomatometer from a small curated early-critic sample skews HIGH, hyped prestige films often open 95-100%. Bear case (Codex family, q 0.47-0.62): strict >90 (a 90 = No) is Nolan's TOP tier - cleared only by Oppenheimer (93) and Dunkirk (92); missed by Inception (87), Interstellar (72), Tenet (69). Divergence: family means 0.76 vs 0.545 = 0.215 > consensus_max_divergence 0.10 -> engine AUTO-SKIPS and flags for human review (system working as designed). Even the ~0.65 midpoint over 0.58/0.59 market is only ~6pt raw, marginal after fees; genuine crux (how much opening samples skew vs strict threshold) is unresolved. WATCH: revisit once real reviews post (~Jul 15-17) when it becomes near-deterministic. Ensemble ran full 2xOpus(inside/outside) + 2xCodex(gpt-5.5 xhigh); no round-2 (divergence already blocks a trade; converging a coin-flip Entertainment market to force a marginal bet = the over-trading FREEZE-14 guards against).
sources: https://www.rottentomatoes.com/m/the_odyssey_2026 (0 reviews as of Jul 12; In Theaters Jul 17)
Kalshi rules KXRT-ODY-90: Tomatometer above 90 on Monday after wide release at 10:00 AM ET

skipped.title: Best AI Jul 2026? | ChatGPT (OpenAI top-ranked LLM on LMArena Rank(UB) on Jul 31)
skipped.reason: SKIP (verification voided the blind ensemble - a calibration lesson). Blind 4-estimator run produced 0.33-0.43 (consensus ~0.39), a ~35pt apparent YES edge over the 0.04/0.05 market. VERIFICATION-LAYER FINDING: those estimates were anchored on SECONDARY variant boards (openlm.ai 'Arena+' agent-driven variant, swfte mirror) that framed OpenAI's GPT-5.6 as a ~1-Elo co-leader. The actual RESOLUTION SOURCE (lmarena.ai Text Arena Overall) - read directly in yesterday's 07-11 cycle (7.27M votes) - puts OpenAI's best (gpt-5.6-sol) at RANK 8, 1486 Elo, ~23 Elo below the Anthropic-swept top 5 (claude-fable-5 #1). Under Rank(UB) rules the 'top-ranked LLM' tiebreak = highest Arena Score = an Anthropic model -> NO today; OpenAI must net-overtake a stable leader within 19 days. The 35pt divergence is the textbook 'large divergence from a liquid board-watching market = estimators behind the market' trap (same mechanism as the CORE moratorium). Corrected q ~= market 0.05; no edge. NOTE: KXLLM1 is Science/Tech (NOT under CORE political moratorium) - skipped purely on no-edge/verification grounds.
sources: https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text (Text Arena Overall; per 07-11 primary read: OpenAI best = rank 8, 1486, top 5 all Anthropic)
https://openlm.ai/chatbot-arena/ (Arena+ VARIANT, Jul 9 - misleading co-leader framing)

skipped.title: Fed July 2026 decision family (maintain 0bps / hike 25bps)
skipped.reason: SKIP. (1) ALREADY POSITIONED: ledger holds Fed-family swing legs (H0-no ~q0.73, H25-yes ~q0.24 per 07-11), so the auto-pick 'no existing open position' rule (SKILL step 3) excludes new orders here - the existing H0-no leg already expresses the 'hold is slightly rich' view. (2) NO CONFIRMABLE EDGE: blind ensemble ~0.70 (anchored to a STALE Jul-8 secondary FedWatch ~70-75%) vs Kalshi market 0.80. The apparent ~10pt NO edge rests on 4-day-old secondary-mirror FedWatch I could not refresh to a confirmed current reading; the market carries the live futures curve (info set superset). June CPI (Jul 14, 2 days out) is a coin-flip catalyst with no informational edge. Half-anchor caps any final at 0.75; combined with imminent CPI event risk and market-replication discipline -> no trade. FOMC 2026-07-29, OI 2.4-3.5M (FedWatch-grade efficiency).
sources: kalshi rules KXFEDDECISION-26JUL-H0 (mutually-exclusive buckets; canceled meeting -> maintain YES)
CME FedWatch (Jul 8 2026, secondary mirrors): ~70-75% hold, 25% hike, 0% cut

skipped.title: Political / current-events shortlist (Trump World Cup, Kash Patel FBI, Maine Senate nominee x2, Mar-a-Lago visits, Alito retirement)
skipped.reason: SKIP (CORE moratorium, CLAUDE.md #10, 5-person council unanimous 2026-07-11). No new LLM direct-bet live positions on political/current-events binaries until 2026-07-23: blind estimate info-set is a subset of the market -> structurally negative EV (council evidence: >12pt-divergence trades went 0/3 -$4.87). Stopping this channel is a risk-reducing action, permitted under FREEZE-14 class-2. Existing MEDNOM-TJAC and Alito positions remain managed by the mechanical swing/stop engine, not re-opened here.

skipped.title: How high will BTC get in July? ($65k / $67.5k strikes)
skipped.reason: SKIP (settlement ambiguity + BLIND-AI-crypto rejection). MAXMON 'How high' strikes carry the touch-vs-cumulative-trimmed-mean settlement ambiguity that split the ensemble on 07-10/07-11 (arbiter KILL, PROTOCOL tie-law #4). Separately, the LLM crypto blind-estimate experiment was judged dead (n=63, Brier(AI) 0.2323 > Brier(market) 0.2046) - LLM price-momentum blind estimates do not beat the market on crypto. Not priceable to real-money precision; no edge. Not researched further.
sources: kalshi rules KXBTCMAXMON (touch vs cumulative trimmed-mean methodology conflict)
